name: Shien Mastery
official_rules_text: When a unit with the Shien Mastery keyword uses the De/f_lect keyword, the attacker suffers 1 Wound for each e result in the defense roll instead of any other Wounds De/f_lect would cause. Additionally, when a unit with the Shien Mastery keyword is the defending unit of a Ranged attack, if it does not suffer Wounds from that attack, it does not gain Suppression tokens during the Assign Suppression Token to Defender step of that attack.
description: When a unit with the Shien Mastery keyword uses the De/f_lect keyword, the attacker suffers 1 Wound for each e result in the defense roll instead of any other Wounds De/f_lect would cause. Additionally, when a unit with the Shien Mastery keyword is the defending unit of a Ranged attack, if it does not suffer Wounds from that attack, it does not gain Suppression tokens during the Assign Suppression Token to Defender step of that attack.
